infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Tracker needs your location to share it with authorized users.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Tracker needs background location access to continuously share your location with authorized users.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: Tracker needs background location access for continuous location sharing.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Tracker needs your location to share it with authorized users.
plugins.locationAlwaysPermission: Tracker needs background location for continuous tracking.
plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Tracker needs your location to show your position on the map.
